meanings.definition: an angular or rounded shape made by folding
a slight depression in the smoothness of a surface
examples: ironing gets rid of most wrinkles

meanings.definition: a Malayan dagger with a wavy blade
make wrinkles or creases on a smooth surface; make a pressed, folded or wrinkled line in
examples: crease the paper like this to make a crane

meanings.definition: become wrinkled or crumpled or creased
